subject: fix: round 2 audit sweep — 21 findings (C1, H1-H2, M1-M10, L2, L6-L7)
body:
Critical:
- C1: Fix useFocusTrap signature in InstallInstructionsModal — was called
  with (ref, isOpen) but hook expects (active) and returns ref. Focus trap
  was completely broken for keyboard users.

High:
- H1: Add setGuideOpen to Header menuItems useMemo dependency array
- H2: Replace shared idx++ with queue.shift() in extract-api.js pMap
  to eliminate any ambiguity about async concurrent access

Medium code fixes:
- M1: Increase toast dismiss button padding from 2px to 8px (was 16x20px,
  now meets mobile touch target requirements)
- M2: Wrap document.referrer parsing in try/catch in EmbedRenderer
- M3: Remove state.darkMode from cross-tab sync effect deps — listener
  now runs once for component lifetime, dispatches unconditionally
- M4: Remove dead state commitListVisible and unused reducer actions
  SET_COMMIT_LIST_VISIBLE, LOAD_MORE_COMMITS (no callers in codebase)
- M9: Route HamburgerMenu action failures to debug pill
- M10: Route data.json load errors and file upload errors to debug pill

Medium doc fixes:
- M5: Document ?data= URL param in USER_GUIDE.md and EMBED_REFERENCE.md
- M6: Document --no-merges flag in ADMIN_GUIDE.md
- M7: Update TESTING_GUIDE hamburger menu test to cover all 6 items
- M8: Update USER_GUIDE menu description with dark mode + User Guide items

Low:
- L2: Add aria-live="polite" to toast container for screen readers
- L6: Mark stale icon path reference in CODE_REVIEW.md as resolved
- L7: Document EXCLUDED_REPOS in ADMIN_GUIDE.md

Tags: bug, a11y, debug, documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-fixes
Semver: patch
